info.title: StrellerMinds Backend API
info.description: Comprehensive API for StrellerMinds - a blockchain education platform built on the Stellar network. Provides secure user management, course delivery, and seamless Stellar blockchain integration for on-chain learning verification and credentialing.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Health check and system status endpoints

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User authentication, registration, and token management

tags.name: Database
tags.description: Database connection pool monitoring and metrics

tags.name: GDPR
tags.description: GDPR compliance - data export and deletion

get.description: Simple health check endpoint to verify API is running.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token for authentication. Tokens are typically sent via secure httpOnly cookies but can also be passed in the Authorization header.
